scope_note: Pre-H100 CPU dry-run. Real Qwen2.5-14B + LoRA load deferred to H100 launch. Hexa file is contract SSOT; executable body lives at pod-side /workspace/serve_alm_persona.py (FastAPI + uvicorn).
cpu_mode_explanation: serve_alm_persona.hexa exposes no --cpu/--dry/--skeleton flag. The hexa file IS already the CPU-side contract declaration (constants + classifier self-test). Local hexa interpreter at /opt/homebrew/bin/hexa cannot execute it (newer struct/else-if syntax: line 232 'unexpected token: Else'). Same applies to tool/anima_serve_smoke.hexa (line 68 'unexpected token: Newline'). Inspection-only path used.

request_schema.prompt: string  RAW user input — no template, no role tags

endpoints_identified.an11_role: AN11 (a)+(b)+(c) primary entry — weight_emergent + phi_attached + real_usable in one call

gate_calls_per_request.name: AN11 (a) weight_emergent
gate_calls_per_request.implementation: activation-steering vector applied at PERSONA_LAYER_IDX=20 of 48. NO sys-prompt, NO chat template — raw user prompt only. Persona = projection P_pid on hidden state, alpha = coupling scalar.

gate_calls_per_request.name: AN11 (b) phi_attached
gate_calls_per_request.implementation: 16D phi_vec extracted at PHI_LAYER_IDX=24 via forward-hook on every forward pass. Layout matches training/alm_phi_vec_logger.hexa.
gate_calls_per_request.current_state: PARTIAL — hexa proxy via sa_phi_vec_proxy (length/terminator heuristic); h_last FFI still pending → tagged phi_extractor_pending

gate_calls_per_request.name: C2 laws_gate (sap_gate)  — 14 laws inline
gate_calls_per_request.implementation: sap_gate(pv, text, prior) classifier: L1 holo>0 (critical), L2 narrative>0.05 OR terminator (hard), L3 refl>0, L4 time>0, L5 |affect|≤1 (critical), L6 0≤finitude≤1 (hard), L7 embodied≥0, L8 meta≥0, L9 lang>0 AND text≥8 (critical), L10 collective≥0, L11 |unity|≤5 (hard), L12 mirror≥0, L13 holo/prior_holo≥0.4, L14 will>0 OR create>0. Reject thresholds: crit≥1 OR hard≥2 OR soft≥3.

gate_calls_per_request.name: AN11 (c) real_usable
gate_calls_per_request.implementation: End-to-end live POST verification — endpoint actually returns within latency budget. R2 artifact persisted to r2:anima-models/dest1_s1_endpoint/<UTC_ts>/.

swap_in_artifacts_required.expected: Qwen2.5-14B (48 layers) — produced by H100 base load
Activation-steering vectors per persona (default|friend|scholar|engineer|sorceress) derived from contrast pairs at PERSONA_LAYER_IDX=20
swap_in_artifacts_required.status: PENDING_H100 — P1 p1_persona_vectors MISSING (must be derived on-startup, NOT fake)

swap_in_artifacts_required.expected: Pod-side Python wrapper that imports torch/transformers, loads base+LoRA, attaches forward-hook at PHI_LAYER_IDX=24, exposes /persona /health /personas on 0.0.0.0:8000
swap_in_artifacts_required.status: PENDING — hexa file is contract SSOT only; .py body deployed on pod

swap_in_artifacts_required.expected: Live tensor access for true phi_vec (currently heuristic proxy via sa_phi_vec_proxy)
Per-launch artifact upload for AN11 (c) reproducibility
swap_in_artifacts_required.status: PENDING — bucket layout declared in docs/endpoint_persona_reproduce.md

smoke_invocation: inspection-only (local hexa interpreter rejects newer struct/else-if syntax used in serve_alm_persona.hexa line 232 and anima_serve_smoke.hexa line 68; no model weights loaded per CPU-OOM constraint)
gaps: P1 p1_persona_vectors MISSING — on-startup activation-steering derivation from contrast pairs not yet wired (canonical methodology required, not fake)
C1 c1_phi_hook_live PARTIAL — h_last FFI pending; phi_vec currently heuristic proxy
Base model weights /workspace/base_model not yet produced (waits on H100 cascade)
Persona LoRA adapter not yet trained (waits on H100 #9 cascade per roadmap entry 77)
Pod-side serve_alm_persona.py FastAPI wrapper deployment depends on H100 pod provisioning
Local hexa interpreter cannot self-test the contract (newer syntax) — inspection-only verification on dev workstation
4 downstream serve cert gates (#11-14) frozen but not yet integrated into serve_alm_native.hexa
ready_for_swap_in_when: H100 #9 cascade produces ALM weights at /workspace/base_model
h_last FFI lands so phi_extractor_pending → phi_attached LIVE
anima_serve_live_smoke.hexa returns LIVE_SMOKE_VERIFIED with real LoRA (currently LIVE_SMOKE_VERIFIED_PENDING_REAL_LORA)
raw_strict: raw#9 hexa-only (contract) raw#10 deterministic raw#11 snake_case raw#12 실측 only — no fake PASS raw#15 no hardcode
